summary: Iteration 32: Feature Guards, Heva Ops Staff Companion, Module Pricing - All tests passed. Backend: 19/19 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI tests passed (100%). Feature guards on POS/KDS/QR routers working correctly, Heva Ops Staff Companion PWA pages fully functional, Module Pricing UI visible and operational.

issues: Chart width/height warnings in console - charts render with 0 dimensions initially (cosmetic, not blocking)

critical_code_review_comments: Feature guards implementation is solid: require_feature() and require_any_feature() correctly return 403 when module is disabled
Platform owner correctly bypasses all feature guards
Heva Ops Staff Companion PWA has proper layout with header, bottom tab bar, and nested routes
Module Pricing card in Platform Settings correctly shows all 4 modules (POS, KDS, QR Ordering, Workforce) with editable prices
All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 32 verified 3 new features: (1) Feature guards on POS/KDS/QR routers - all endpoints correctly check require_feature/require_any_feature, (2) Heva Ops Staff Companion PWA at /heva-ops/* with My Shifts, Clock In/Out PIN pad, and Swap Requests pages - all working with proper data-testid attributes, (3) Module Pricing in Platform Settings - card shows POS/KDS/QR/Workforce prices with Save Pricing button. rest_demo_1 has all features enabled: {pos:true, kds:true, qr_ordering:true, workforce:true}. All existing POS functionality still works.

feature_guards_pos_endpoints.evidence: Backend tests confirm /api/orders, /api/cash-drawer/*, /api/categories, /api/products, /api/printers, /api/tables all accessible with pos=true

feature_guards_kds_endpoints.evidence: Backend tests confirm /api/kds/orders and /api/kds/stats accessible with kds=true

feature_guards_qr_endpoints.evidence: Backend tests confirm /api/qr/tables/hashes accessible with qr_ordering=true, public menu checks qr_ordering feature flag

module_pricing_get.evidence: GET /api/platform/module-pricing returns default prices for platform_owner

module_pricing_update.evidence: PUT /api/platform/module-pricing updates prices successfully and persists changes

module_pricing_restricted.evidence: Module pricing returns 403 for non-platform-owner users

heva_ops_layout.evidence: HevaOpsLayout loads with header (data-testid=heva-ops-header), bottom tab bar (data-testid=heva-ops-tabs)

heva_ops_clock_in_out.evidence: /heva-ops/clock loads with live clock (08:46:09), PIN pad (1-9, 0, DEL), status badge showing 'Clocked Out'

platform_settings_module_pricing_card.evidence: Module Pricing card visible with POS (25.99), KDS (12.99), QR Ordering (18.99), Workforce (29.99) inputs and Save Pricing button

pos_terminal_still_works.evidence: POS Terminal page loads correctly with product grid, categories, and order panel

sidebar_workforce_items.evidence: Sidebar shows Shift Scheduler, Attendance, Timesheets nav items for SKAdmin

platform_owner_bypasses_guards.evidence: Platform owner can access KDS and orders endpoints without restaurant assignment
